programme.title: Uz mūžu
programme.desc: Jaunībā Pedro un Klāra bija patiesi iemīlējušies un pārliecināti, ka tā tas būs līdz mūža beigām. Tomēr Klāras ģimenes aizspriedumi pret Pedro necilo izcelsmi izrādījās spēcīgāki par jauniešu mīlestību - ar viltu viņi tika izšķirti. Pēc gadiem Klāra atgriežas dzimtajā pilsētā, bet Pedro nu pieder visas bagātības, ko vien viņš varētu vēlēties, izņemot vienu - viņa pirmo un īsto mīlestību Klāru. Pedro ir gatavs uz visu, lai atgūtu Klāru, taču nav rēķinājies ar vienu - viņa ir saderinājusies ar Pedro brāli Lorenco. Galvenajās lomās: Diogo Morgado, Inese Kastela-Branko, Pedro Sousa

programme.title: Izredzētais
programme.desc: Ietekmīgās un bagātās Korānu ģimenes galva vectēvs Halis ir noraizējies par mazdēlu Feritu. Kamēr pārējie ģimenes locekļi pievērsušies ģimenes biznesam, Ferits bauda bezrūpīgu un vieglprātīgu dzīvi, dienas pavadot ballītēs un ielaižoties gadījuma sakaros ar sievietēm. Cerot, ka puisis nomierināsies, vectēvs nolemj viņu izprecināt. Izdzirdot, ka iekārojamam un bagātajam Feritam tiek meklēta sieva, Kazima kungs piedāvā viņam savas vecākās meitas Sunas roku, tomēr Ferits īsi pirms tam ir saticis šīs ģimenes jaunāko meitu Seiranu un vēlas apprecēt tieši viņu. Tēvs, nepadomājot, ko tas nodarīs ģimenei un māsu attiecībām, izdod Seiranu Feritam par sievu. Tā sākas melu, noslēpumu, nodevības un mīlestības pilns ceļš uz jaunlaulāto laimi.

programme.title: Slavenības. Bez filtra
programme.desc: "Slavenības. Bez filtra" 14. sezona sniedz ekskluzīvu iespēju ieskatīties sabiedrībā zināmu personu ikdienas aizkulisēs. Skatītāji varēs sekot līdzi gan labi iepazītu slavenību ikdienai, gan uzzināt daudz jauna arī par šova jaunpienācējiem. Ekscentriskajam Kambalu pārim, dzejniecei Magonei Liedeskalnai un šerpajai latgaļu dāmai Margaritai Kolosovai pievienosies uzņēmējs Niks Endziņš un digitālā satura veidotāja Sindija Bokāne, savukārt aktuālākajos notikumos ar slavenībām tiksies aktieris Andris Bulis! Kādi notikumi apvij pašmāju spožāko personību dzīves, nonākot sabiedrības uzmanības epicentrā?

programme.title: Ģimene burkā
programme.desc: Realitātes seriāla "Ģimene burkā" 11. sezona! Lai palīdzētu piepildīt ģimeņu vēlmes un pārvarētu pastāvošos saspīlējumus, mērķtiecīgu darbu ar dalībniekiem turpinās attiecību treneris Kristaps Ozoliņš, veicinot izpratni un cieņu katrā ģimenē. Savas mājas durvis skatītājiem atvērs jau iepazītas, gan jaunas ģimenes - dziedātājs Lauris Valters ar sievu un Vizuļu-Kohu ģimene, Olga un Viesturs, kas piedalās šovā, jo grib iemācīties sadzirdēt viens otru kā arī pareizi strīdēties. Tāpat skatītājus gaida atkalredzēšanās ar kuplo Bindru ģimeni, Karalkinu ģimeni, kura vada savas dienas īstā lauku saimniecībā.

programme.title: Samta dinastija
programme.desc: Ana ir nabadzīgas šuvējas meita no Meksikas, bet Alberto - smalka Ņujorkas modes nama īpašnieka dēls. Viņu mīlestības stāsts sākās jau pirms 15 gadiem. Toreiz ģimenes bija pret šīm attiecībām un piespieda šķirties, bet nu abi ir satikušies atkal un nedomā ļaut kādam stāties ceļā viņu jūtām. Kad negaidīti pašnāvību izdara Alberto tēvs, atklājas, ka modes nams ir nonācis finansiālās grūtībās. Ne visus apmierina atstātā mantojuma sadalījums, un sākas nežēlīga cīņa par modes impēriju. Mīlestība, nodevība, ambīcijas un alkatība uz augstās modes un debesskrāpju fona. Galvenajās lomās: Jons Gonzaless, Samanta Sikveirosa, Kerolaina Miranda

programme.title: Samta dinastija

programme.title: JĀ vārds svešiniekam
programme.desc: Būt vienam var būt nomācoši, bet atrast savu otro pusīti bieži vien nav nemaz tik vienkārši. Palīgā mīlestības meklētājiem nāk šovs "Jāvārds svešiniekam"! Drosmīgi mīlestības meklētāji ir piekrituši teikt jāvārdu pilnīgiem svešiniekiem - apprecēties jau pirmajā tikšanās reizē un darīt visu, lai šī laulība izdotos, jo izeja no šīm attiecībām ir tikai viena - oficiāla šķiršanās. Nav gan tā, ka jāvārds jāsaka pilnīgi nepiemērotam cilvēkam - piecus pārus ar zinātniskām metodēm kopā salikuši eksperti, balstoties uz šova dalībnieku rakstura iezīmēm, dzīves veidu, nodarbošanos, hobijiem un vēlmēm par to, kādu viņi iedomājušies savu īsto pusīti. Vai tikšanās pie altāra būs liktenīga? Vai jaunais pāris būs sajūsmā viens par otru, vai arī viņu acīs būs vērojama vilšanās? Vai vispār visi spēs aiziet līdz altārim, lai teiktu jāvārdu pilnīgam svešiniekam? Un kā izvērsīsies to dzīves, kuriem pietiks drosme šim solim?

programme.title: JĀ vārds svešiniekam

Tāpat skatītājus gaida atkalredzēšanās ar kuplo Bindru ģimeni, Karalkinu ģimeni, kura vada savas dienas īstā lauku saimniecībā.

programme.title: Viena mīla
programme.desc: Abdullāhs pārtrauc attiecības ar Alevu. Mustafu moka sirdsapziņas pārmetumi par meliem saistībā ar Alevu. Čimena jaunajā dzīvē piedzīvo grūtus laikus, cenšoties pielāgoties rutīnai, pie kuras nav pieradusi. Nilei, kura uzskata, ka ir adoptēta, ierodas pie Giraja, līdzi ņemot Dou, lai visu noskaidrotu.

programme.title: Viena mīla
programme.desc: Kivilčima un Omers beidzot pieņem lēmumu dzīvot kopā - viņa pārceļas pie Omera un sāk ieviest savu kārtību. Nilei paziņo Mustafam, ka, iespējams, nāk no bagātas ģimenes un grib veikt DNS testu. Nursema saņem paaugstinājumu televīzijā, taču Umuts par to nepriecājas.

programme.title: Mis Fišere izmeklē
programme.desc: 20. gadsimta 20.-to gadu beigas, Melburna. Sabiedrības dāma Frainija Fišere - neatkarīga, drosmīga un ar izcilu intuīciju - slepus izmeklē slepkavības un citus noziegumus, kuros policija bieži nonāk strupceļā. Kopā ar uzticamo palīdzi Dotu, draugu loku un policijas detektīvu Džeku Robinsonu, ar kuru viņu saista dzirksteļojoša spriedze, Frainija atklāj patiesību tur, kur valda noslēpumi, aizspriedumi un ietekmīgu cilvēku intereses. Seriāls apvieno intriģējošus detektīvstāstus, spilgtu laikmeta atmosfēru un harizmātisku galveno varoni, kas vienmēr spēlē pēc saviem noteikumiem. Galvenajās lomās: Esija Deivisa, Nātans Peidžs, Hugo Džonstons-Bērts

programme.title: CSI Maiami
programme.desc: Nogalināts skeitbordists, kas reizē ir arī ekstrēmo video spēļu testētājs. CSI izmeklētāji atklāj, ka nogalināšanas brīdī viņš valkājis atstarojošus sensorus, kuri seko līdzi kustībām, bet diemžēl nenorāda uz slepkavu. Izmeklētājiem jāienirst spriedzes un konkurences pilnajā programmētāju un testētāju pasaulē, lai to atrastu.

programme.title: Izmeklē Lolita Lobosko
programme.desc: Pēc ilgstoša darba Ziemeļitālijā veiksmīgā, harismātiskā un profesionālā izmeklētāja Lolita Lobosko atgriezusies dzimtajā pilsētā - Bari, Apūlijas reģionā. Viņa te vada vietējās policijas izmeklēšanas nodaļu, kur nākas saskarties ar konservatīviem kolēģiem, sarežģītiem noziegumiem un personīgās dzīves izaicinājumiem. Katrā sērijā tiek izmeklēta kāda intriģējoša krimināllieta, un paralēli seriāls ļauj ielūkoties arī Lolitas dažbrīd komiskajā ikdienā - attiecībās ar māti, labāko draudzeni Mariju, kā arī viņas slepeno sirdsāķīti. Galvenajās lomās: Luisa Renjeri, Džovanni Ludeno, Bjanka Napi

programme.title: Slavenības. Bez filtra
programme.desc: "Slavenības. Bez filtra" 14. sezona sniedz ekskluzīvu iespēju ieskatīties sabiedrībā zināmu personu ikdienas aizkulisēs. programme.title: Patiesi stāsti seriālā "Playboy noslēpumi"
programme.desc: Dokumentāls seriāls, kas atklāj glamūrīgās un spožās Hjū Hefnera "Playboy" impērijas tumšo pusi. Hjū Hefners bija veiksmīgs uzņēmējs, atbalstīja vārda brīvību, sieviešu tiesības un ar savu žurnālu mēģināja radīt seksuālu revolūciju, kas sievietes un vīriešus padarītu vienlīdzīgākus. Viņa greznajā savrupnamā dzīvoja modeles, Hjū Hefnera draudzenes, tika rīkotas grandiozas ballītes, kuras apmeklēja ietekmīgi un slaveni viesi, un daudzi par Hefneru izsakās ar apbrīnu. Dokumentālais seriāls atklāj daudz jauna un nepatīkama par "Playboy" aizkulisēm un pašu odiozo Hefneru. Atmiņās dalās bijušās modeles, Hjū Hefnera draugi un laika biedri.

programme.title: Slavenības. Bez filtra
programme.desc: "Slavenības. Bez filtra" 13. sezona sniedz ekskluzīvu iespēju ieskatīties sabiedrībā zināmu personu ikdienas aizkulisēs. Skatītāji varēs sekot līdzi gan labi iepazītu slavenību ikdienai, gan uzzināt daudz jauna arī par šova jaunpienācējiem. Ekscentriskajam Kambalu pārim, dzejniecei Magonei Liedeskalnai un skandalozajiem Gluzunoviem pievienosies šarmantā dejotāja Aleksandra Kurusova, šerpā latgaļu dāma Margarita Kolosova, bet jaunā rubrikā slavenību drēbju skapjos un mājās ielūkosies stiliste Indra Salceviča, savukārt aktuālākajos notikumos ar viņiem tiksies aktieris Andris Bulis! Kādu stāstu aiz sevis slēpj slavenību iemīļotākie un unikālākie tērpi? Un kādi notikumi apvij pašmāju spožāko personību dzīves, nonākot sabiedrības uzmanības epicentrā?

programme.title: Uz mūžu
programme.desc: Jaunībā Pedro un Klāra bija patiesi iemīlējušies un pārliecināti, ka tā tas būs līdz mūža beigām. Tomēr Klāras ģimenes aizspriedumi pret Pedro necilo izcelsmi izrādījās spēcīgāki par jauniešu mīlestību - ar viltu viņi tika izšķirti. Pēc gadiem Klāra atgriežas dzimtajā pilsētā, bet Pedro nu pieder visas bagātības, ko vien viņš varētu vēlēties, izņemot vienu - viņa pirmo un īsto mīlestību Klāru. Pedro ir gatavs uz visu, lai atgūtu Klāru, taču nav rēķinājies ar vienu - viņa ir saderinājusies ar Pedro brāli Lorenco. Galvenajās lomās: Diogo Morgado, Inese Kastela-Branko, Pedro Sousa

programme.title: Izredzētais
programme.desc: Ietekmīgās un bagātās Korānu ģimenes galva vectēvs Halis ir noraizējies par mazdēlu Feritu. Kamēr pārējie ģimenes locekļi pievērsušies ģimenes biznesam, Ferits bauda bezrūpīgu un vieglprātīgu dzīvi, dienas pavadot ballītēs un ielaižoties gadījuma sakaros ar sievietēm. Cerot, ka puisis nomierināsies, vectēvs nolemj viņu izprecināt. Izdzirdot, ka iekārojamam un bagātajam Feritam tiek meklēta sieva, Kazima kungs piedāvā viņam savas vecākās meitas Sunas roku, tomēr Ferits īsi pirms tam ir saticis šīs ģimenes jaunāko meitu Seiranu un vēlas apprecēt tieši viņu. Tēvs, nepadomājot, ko tas nodarīs ģimenei un māsu attiecībām, izdod Seiranu Feritam par sievu. Tā sākas melu, noslēpumu, nodevības un mīlestības pilns ceļš uz jaunlaulāto laimi.

programme.title: Keitija Forda. Citas bērns
programme.desc: Ella ir gatava beidzot šķirties no vīra Adriana, kurš viņu krāpis un kļuvis par tēvu citas sievietes bērnam. Taču tieši pirms šķiršanās procesa Adrians gūst traumu un nonāk slimnīcā, atstājot Ellu vienu ar savu mazo meitu Houpu. Sievietes rūpīgi plānotais jaunais sākums pēkšņi pārvēršas negaidītu pienākumu, sarežģītu jūtu un mulsinošu situāciju virpulī. Kamēr Ella cenšas sakārtot savu personīgo dzīvi un profesionālo nākotni, Adrians pēc negadījuma sāk uzvesties pavisam citādi. Arvien biežāk Ella nonāk situācijās, kurās viņai jāuzņemas rūpes par bērnu, kurš reiz kļuva par viņas laulības sabrukuma simbolu. Taču tieši šie pārbaudījumi liek viņai no jauna izvērtēt attiecības, aizvainojumu un iespēju dzīvi sākt no cita skatu punkta.

programme.title: Samta dinastija
programme.desc: Ana ir nabadzīgas šuvējas meita no Meksikas, bet Alberto - smalka Ņujorkas modes nama īpašnieka dēls. Viņu mīlestības stāsts sākās jau pirms 15 gadiem. Toreiz ģimenes bija pret šīm attiecībām un piespieda šķirties, bet nu abi ir satikušies atkal un nedomā ļaut kādam stāties ceļā viņu jūtām. Kad negaidīti pašnāvību izdara Alberto tēvs, atklājas, ka modes nams ir nonācis finansiālās grūtībās. Ne visus apmierina atstātā mantojuma sadalījums, un sākas nežēlīga cīņa par modes impēriju. Mīlestība, nodevība, ambīcijas un alkatība uz augstās modes un debesskrāpju fona. Galvenajās lomās: Jons Gonzaless, Samanta Sikveirosa, Kerolaina Miranda

programme.title: Samta dinastija
programme.desc: Ana ir nabadzīgas šuvējas meita no Meksikas, bet Alberto - smalka Ņujorkas modes nama īpašnieka dēls. Viņu mīlestības stāsts sākās jau pirms 15 gadiem. Mīlestība, nodevība, ambīcijas un alkatība uz augstās modes un debesskrāpju fona. Galvenajās lomās: Jons Gonzaless, Samanta Sikveirosa, Kerolaina Miranda

programme.title: JĀ vārds svešiniekam
programme.desc: Būt vienam var būt nomācoši, bet atrast savu otro pusīti bieži vien nav nemaz tik vienkārši. Palīgā mīlestības meklētājiem nāk šovs "Jāvārds svešiniekam"! Drosmīgi mīlestības meklētāji ir piekrituši teikt jāvārdu pilnīgiem svešiniekiem - apprecēties jau pirmajā tikšanās reizē un darīt visu, lai šī laulība izdotos, jo izeja no šīm attiecībām ir tikai viena - oficiāla šķiršanās. Nav gan tā, ka jāvārds jāsaka pilnīgi nepiemērotam cilvēkam - piecus pārus ar zinātniskām metodēm kopā salikuši eksperti, balstoties uz šova dalībnieku rakstura iezīmēm, dzīves veidu, nodarbošanos, hobijiem un vēlmēm par to, kādu viņi iedomājušies savu īsto pusīti. Vai tikšanās pie altāra būs liktenīga? Vai jaunais pāris būs sajūsmā viens par otru, vai arī viņu acīs būs vērojama vilšanās? Vai vispār visi spēs aiziet līdz altārim, lai teiktu jāvārdu pilnīgam svešiniekam? Un kā izvērsīsies to dzīves, kuriem pietiks drosme šim solim?

programme.title: Slepkavības...
programme.desc: Honflēras ostā tiek atrasts plastmasas maiss, kurā atrodas cilvēka mirstīgās atliekas. Upuris ir klāts ar smiltīm un rupjo sāli, kas vedina domāt, ka slepkavība izdarīta, balstoties uz kādu senu leģendu, saistītu ar Honflēru. Izmeklēšanu vada jaunā kapteine Džastīna Līroja, kurai nākas sadarboties ar savu bijušo pasniedzēju un izbijušu policistu, tagad restorāna īpašnieku Polu Mesnilu, lai atšķetinātu šo lietu. Galvenajās lomās: Helēna Sezāra un Bernārs Fārsijs.

programme.title: Viena mīla
programme.desc: Fātihs un Doa atgriežas mājās, un Fātihs paziņo ģimenei, ka Nursema un Firazs turpmāk dzīvos pie Kivilčimas. Kivilčima saņem ziņu no ārsta par to, ka viņai būs dēls, un nolemj sarīkot Omeram pārsteigumu. Doa atzīstas Kivilčimai, ka pēc ceļojuma nonākusi parādos.

programme.title: Viena mīla
programme.desc: Omers uzzina par gaidāmo dēlu un ir ļoti laimīgs. Asude piedāvā Firazam pēdējo iespēju - darbu uzņēmumā par zemu algu. Omers piedāvā Nursemai atvērt veikalu jaunajā viesnīcā, taču Pembē par to nav sajūsmā. Pie Doas ierodas tiesu izpildītājs, lai piedzītu parādu.

programme.title: Mis Fišere izmeklē
programme.desc: 20. gadsimta 20.-to gadu beigas, Melburna. Sabiedrības dāma Frainija Fišere - neatkarīga, drosmīga un ar izcilu intuīciju - slepus izmeklē slepkavības un citus noziegumus, kuros policija bieži nonāk strupceļā. Kopā ar uzticamo palīdzi Dotu, draugu loku un policijas detektīvu Džeku Robinsonu, ar kuru viņu saista dzirksteļojoša spriedze, Frainija atklāj patiesību tur, kur valda noslēpumi, aizspriedumi un ietekmīgu cilvēku intereses. Seriāls apvieno intriģējošus detektīvstāstus, spilgtu laikmeta atmosfēru un harizmātisku galveno varoni, kas vienmēr spēlē pēc saviem noteikumiem. Galvenajās lomās: Esija Deivisa, Nātans Peidžs, Hugo Džonstons-Bērts

programme.title: CSI Maiami
programme.desc: Mēģinot atsavināt nodokļa nemaksātāja jahtu, tiek nogalināts ieņēmuma dienesta darbinieks. Pavisam īsu brīdi pēc šī notikuma nogalināts vēl viens viņa aroda brālis. Zīmīgi, ka abas slepkavības notiek tieši nodokļu iekasēšanas periodā. Vai tā ir tikai nejauša sakritība?

programme.title: Čārlija eņģeļi
programme.desc: Elitāru privātaģentu trijotnei ir jāliek lietā vismodernākās tehniskās iespējas, cīņas prasme un personīgais šarms, lai glābtu svarīgu, balsi pārveidojošu datorprogrammu no neīstajām rokām. Viņas ir skaistas un neaizstājamas, un strādā Čārlija labā. Maskējušās kā geišas, vēderdejotājas un sacīkšu braucējas, mēģinot iefiltrēties noziedznieku vidē, eņģeļi un Boslijs meklē kaut mazāko pavedienu. Nupat jau šķiet, ka tas ir atrasts un risinājums ir tepat blakus, līdz Dilana atklāj noslēpumu, kas pakļauj gan viņu, gan Čārlija dzīvības briesmām.

programme.title: Pārmaiņu vēji
programme.desc: Sevilja, 1920. gadi. Jaunām dāmām paredzētā akadēmijā valda stingras tradīcijas un konservatīvi uzskati par sievietes lomu sabiedrībā — tās mērķis ir sagatavot audzēknes "labas sievas" lomai. Šī pasaule tiek satricināta, kad skolā ierodas jauna, neatkarīga un noslēpumaina skolotāja Terēza. Bēgot no skandaloza notikuma Lisabonā, viņa ierodas akadēmijā ar slepenu mērķi, kas saistīts ar pašas pagātni. Terēza ievieš jaunas mācību metodes un mudina meitenes domāt patstāvīgi, meklēt savu balsi un nebaidīties no pārmaiņām. Seriāls caur skolotāju un skolnieču likteņiem apskata tādas tēmas kā tiesības uz izglītību, dzimumu līdztiesība un personīgā brīvība, radot spēcīgu portretu par laiku, kad pasaule sāka mainīties. Galvenajās lomās: Maite Perroni, Patrīsija Lopesa Arnaisa.

programme.title: Mīlestības grāmata
programme.desc: Rakstieks Henrijs Kopers piedzīvo sava jaunā romāna neveiksmi. Izdevēja Džena pavēsta, ka grāmatai ir pārsteidzoši panākumi Meksikā, tāpēc jādodas turp sniegt autogrāfus un satikties ar faniem. Tur viņš sastop tulkotāju Mariju, kura atklāj, ka ir pilnībā pārstrādājusi viņa grāmatu kaislīgā mīlas romānā. Sākumā Henrijs ir apjucis par grāmatas popularitāti un pikanto Marijas versiju, taču ar laiku pieņem viņas ieguldījumu. Strādājot kopā, starp viņiem uzplaukst romantiskas jūtas, bet abiem pa vidu iejaucas Antonio, Marijas bijušais. Greizsirdības sagrauts, Henrijs atgriežas Anglijā, taču domas par Mariju neļauj viņam dzīvot mierīgi…

programme.title: Возвращение Мухтара
programme.desc: Приключения сплоченной команды сотрудников милиции и служебного пса Мухтара продолжаются. Оперативники Максим Жаров и Алексей Самойлов, следователь Василиса Михайлова и их четвероногий друг сталкиваются с самыми разными преступлениями. Чаще всего главную роль в расследованиях играет именно мохнатый страж порядка. Работа у Мухтара непростая, и его главная задача — найти и обезвредить! Помимо того, что Муха — настоящий профессионал, он еще и верный помощник, настоящий друг, готовый всегда прийти на выручку. Он — душа команды. Именно благодаря его уникальным способностям — исключительному обонянию, "шестому чувству", моментальной реакции и преданности хозяину — команде детективов удается справляться с любыми делами — и рядовыми, и повышенной сложности!

programme.title: Возвращение Мухтара
programme.desc: Приключения сплоченной команды сотрудников милиции и служебного пса Мухтара продолжаются. Оперативники Максим Жаров и Алексей Самойлов, следователь Василиса Михайлова и их четвероногий друг сталкиваются с самыми разными преступлениями. Чаще всего главную роль в расследованиях играет именно мохнатый страж порядка. Работа у Мухтара непростая, и его главная задача — найти и обезвредить! Помимо того, что Муха — настоящий профессионал, он еще и верный помощник, настоящий друг, готовый всегда прийти на выручку. Он — душа команды. Именно благодаря его уникальным способностям — исключительному обонянию, "шестому чувству", моментальной реакции и преданности хозяину — команде детективов удается справляться с любыми делами — и рядовыми, и повышенной сложности!

programme.title: Мамахохотала
programme.desc: Новый сезон молодежного юмористического шоу "Мамахохотала" на НЛО TV! Что происходит у Вани и Люды, Ани и Жени, Валерчика и Ва-Вадика? Новый сезон даст ответ и покажет жизнь с разных, но таких знакомых сторон. Актуальные шутки, повседневные ситуации, новые образы и первый в истории интерактивный номер, в котором зритель сам выбирает, что будет дальше.

programme.title: Агенты справедливости
programme.desc: "Агенты справедливости" — это детективный сериал о независимых журналистах. Главные герои проекта — журналист Вадим Зорин и частный детектив Наталья Дзюбенко. В каждой серии детектива представлена одна история. К популярному журналисту Вадиму Зорину и созданного им бюро журналистских расследований часто обращаются обычные люди, которым нужна помощь профессионалов в раскрытии того или иного преступления. Вместе с частным детективом Натальей Дзюбенко известный журналист расследует самые запутанные преступления, восстанавливает справедливость и разгадывает самые сложные загадки. Вадим и Наталья будут привлекать к проведению следствия опытных экспертов: психолога, криминалиста, юриста, судмедэксперта, физиогномиcта и баллистика. В каждом выпуске "Агентов справедливости" зрители увидят реконструкции всех версий преступления, а также множество следственных экспериментов.

programme.title: Вызов
programme.desc: Героями сериала станут пожарные, пиротехники, альпинисты, кинологи, водолазы, психологи и парамедики. Сериал подробнее познакомит зрителей с профессией спасателя и расскажет о нелегком труде ГСЧС, ведь каждый раз вытягивая из смертельной опасности пострадавших, каждый спасатель прежде всего рискует собственной жизнью.

programme.title: Вызов
programme.desc: Героями сериала станут пожарные, пиротехники, альпинисты, кинологи, водолазы, психологи и парамедики. Сериал подробнее познакомит зрителей с профессией спасателя и расскажет о нелегком труде ГСЧС, ведь каждый раз вытягивая из смертельной опасности пострадавших, каждый спасатель прежде всего рискует собственной жизнью.

programme.title: Пёс
programme.desc: Макс — алкоголик. Когда-то лучший сыщик в городе, Макс потерял все — работу, друзей, жену. У него остался единственный друг — Пес. После серии погонь, драк и перестрелок, Пес и Макс раскрыли тайну загадочного убийства. Макс с Псом снова стали детективами. Теперь каждый день начинается с того, что Пес и Макс пытаются выяснить, кто совершил преступление… И выяснить — кто из них лучший сыщик в городе!

programme.title: Пёс
programme.desc: Макс — алкоголик. Когда-то лучший сыщик в городе, Макс потерял все — работу, друзей, жену. У него остался единственный друг — Пес. После серии погонь, драк и перестрелок, Пес и Макс раскрыли тайну загадочного убийства. Макс с Псом снова стали детективами. Теперь каждый день начинается с того, что Пес и Макс пытаются выяснить, кто совершил преступление… И выяснить — кто из них лучший сыщик в городе!

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. Служба имеет целый штат профессионалов своего дела – тут и криминалисты, и баллистики, и патологоанатомы, и программисты. Кроме того, каждый кабинет оборудован по последнему слову техники. Парк автомобилей представлен лучшими моделями отечественного и иностранного производства. На этот раз ребятам предстоит столкнуться с серийным убийцей. Он хитер, расчетлив, и каждый раз ему удается бежать от наказания. Однако за дело берутся лучшие специалисты в своем деле, и на этот раз ему не скрыться. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: Вызов
programme.desc: Героями сериала станут пожарные, пиротехники, альпинисты, кинологи, водолазы, психологи и парамедики. Сериал подробнее познакомит зрителей с профессией спасателя и расскажет о нелегком труде ГСЧС, ведь каждый раз вытягивая из смертельной опасности пострадавших, каждый спасатель прежде всего рискует собственной жизнью.

programme.title: Вызов
programme.desc: Героями сериала станут пожарные, пиротехники, альпинисты, кинологи, водолазы, психологи и парамедики. Сериал подробнее познакомит зрителей с профессией спасателя и расскажет о нелегком труде ГСЧС, ведь каждый раз вытягивая из смертельной опасности пострадавших, каждый спасатель прежде всего рискует собственной жизнью.

programme.title: Пёс
programme.desc: Макс — алкоголик. Когда-то лучший сыщик в городе, Макс потерял все — работу, друзей, жену. У него остался единственный друг — Пес. После серии погонь, драк и перестрелок, Пес и Макс раскрыли тайну загадочного убийства. Макс с Псом снова стали детективами. Теперь каждый день начинается с того, что Пес и Макс пытаются выяснить, кто совершил преступление… И выяснить — кто из них лучший сыщик в городе!

programme.title: Пёс
programme.desc: Макс — алкоголик. Когда-то лучший сыщик в городе, Макс потерял все — работу, друзей, жену. У него остался единственный друг — Пес. После серии погонь, драк и перестрелок, Пес и Макс раскрыли тайну загадочного убийства. Макс с Псом снова стали детективами. Теперь каждый день начинается с того, что Пес и Макс пытаются выяснить, кто совершил преступление… И выяснить — кто из них лучший сыщик в городе!

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. Служба имеет целый штат профессионалов своего дела – тут и криминалисты, и баллистики, и патологоанатомы, и программисты. Кроме того, каждый кабинет оборудован по последнему слову техники. Парк автомобилей представлен лучшими моделями отечественного и иностранного производства. На этот раз ребятам предстоит столкнуться с серийным убийцей. Он хитер, расчетлив, и каждый раз ему удается бежать от наказания. Однако за дело берутся лучшие специалисты в своем деле, и на этот раз ему не скрыться. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: Агенты справедливости
programme.desc: "Агенты справедливости" — это детективный сериал о независимых журналистах. Главные герои проекта — журналист Вадим Зорин и частный детектив Наталья Дзюбенко. В каждой серии детектива представлена одна история. К популярному журналисту Вадиму Зорину и созданного им бюро журналистских расследований часто обращаются обычные люди, которым нужна помощь профессионалов в раскрытии того или иного преступления. Вместе с частным детективом Натальей Дзюбенко известный журналист расследует самые запутанные преступления, восстанавливает справедливость и разгадывает самые сложные загадки. Вадим и Наталья будут привлекать к проведению следствия опытных экспертов: психолога, криминалиста, юриста, судмедэксперта, физиогномиcта и баллистика. В каждом выпуске "Агентов справедливости" зрители увидят реконструкции всех версий преступления, а также множество следственных экспериментов.

programme.title: Агенты справедливости
programme.desc: "Агенты справедливости" — это детективный сериал о независимых журналистах. Главные герои проекта — журналист Вадим Зорин и частный детектив Наталья Дзюбенко. В каждом выпуске "Агентов справедливости" зрители увидят реконструкции всех версий преступления, а также множество следственных экспериментов.

programme.title: Возвращение Мухтара
programme.desc: Приключения сплоченной команды сотрудников милиции и служебного пса Мухтара продолжаются. Оперативники Максим Жаров и Алексей Самойлов, следователь Василиса Михайлова и их четвероногий друг сталкиваются с самыми разными преступлениями. Чаще всего главную роль в расследованиях играет именно мохнатый страж порядка. Работа у Мухтара непростая, и его главная задача — найти и обезвредить! Помимо того, что Муха — настоящий профессионал, он еще и верный помощник, настоящий друг, готовый всегда прийти на выручку. Он — душа команды. Именно благодаря его уникальным способностям — исключительному обонянию, "шестому чувству", моментальной реакции и преданности хозяину — команде детективов удается справляться с любыми делами — и рядовыми, и повышенной сложности!

programme.title: Возвращение Мухтара

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага
programme.desc: Оставленным на второй год пятикурсникам Антону и Кузе привалило счастье. Их старая общага идет под снос, и в новом корпусе их селят в блок с тремя девушками - Кристиной, Машей и Яной. В роли аспиранта в универ возвращается и Майкл - чтобы откосить от армии. Ребята стали старше и... романтичнее. Теперь им хочется не только секса и тусовок, но и настоящих чувств. Однако вызвать взаимность у дам сердца не так просто, как кажется.

programme.title: Лабиринт
programme.desc: Истории, от которых кровь стынет в жилах, события, которые пугают и будоражат сознание, явления, находящиеся за гранью простой человеческой логики – после любых попыток их объяснить ученые только разводят руками. В новом мистическом проекте "Лабиринт" на ICTV зритель увидит то, что неподвластно традиционной науке! Мистический журнал "Лабиринт" – это расследование загадочных историй, которые полностью переворачивают жизнь людей, ставят в тупик научные теории и не дают спать ученым, тщетно пытающимся объяснить аномалии с помощью законов природы.

programme.title: Лабиринт
programme.desc: Истории, от которых кровь стынет в жилах, события, которые пугают и будоражат сознание, явления, находящиеся за гранью простой человеческой логики – после любых попыток их объяснить ученые только разводят руками. В новом мистическом проекте "Лабиринт" на ICTV зритель увидит то, что неподвластно традиционной науке! Мистический журнал "Лабиринт" – это расследование загадочных историй, которые полностью переворачивают жизнь людей, ставят в тупик научные теории и не дают спать ученым, тщетно пытающимся объяснить аномалии с помощью законов природы.

programme.title: Склифосовский
programme.desc: Фильм о сложных, драматичных, подчас героических буднях врачей главного института скорой помощи – знаменитого "Склифа". Их работа – испытание на прочность, каждый день они дают кому-то вторую жизнь... В центре истории – непростые отношения хирурга Олега Брагина, блестящего врача, умного, жесткого и харизматичного, но давно отчаявшегося найти в жизни что-то настоящее, кроме работы, и начальницы Ларисы – сумевшей сквозь цинизм Брагина разглядеть потерянного в жизни и одинокого человека...

programme.title: Склифосовский
programme.desc: Фильм о сложных, драматичных, подчас героических буднях врачей главного института скорой помощи – знаменитого "Склифа". Их работа – испытание на прочность, каждый день они дают кому-то вторую жизнь... В центре истории – непростые отношения хирурга Олега Брагина, блестящего врача, умного, жесткого и харизматичного, но давно отчаявшегося найти в жизни что-то настоящее, кроме работы, и начальницы Ларисы – сумевшей сквозь цинизм Брагина разглядеть потерянного в жизни и одинокого человека...

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. Служба имеет целый штат профессионалов своего дела – тут и криминалисты, и баллистики, и патологоанатомы, и программисты. Кроме того, каждый кабинет оборудован по последнему слову техники. Парк автомобилей представлен лучшими моделями отечественного и иностранного производства. На этот раз ребятам предстоит столкнуться с серийным убийцей. Он хитер, расчетлив, и каждый раз ему удается бежать от наказания. Однако за дело берутся лучшие специалисты в своем деле, и на этот раз ему не скрыться. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага
programme.desc: Оставленным на второй год пятикурсникам Антону и Кузе привалило счастье. Их старая общага идет под снос, и в новом корпусе их селят в блок с тремя девушками - Кристиной, Машей и Яной. В роли аспиранта в универ возвращается и Майкл - чтобы откосить от армии. Ребята стали старше и... романтичнее. Теперь им хочется не только секса и тусовок, но и настоящих чувств. Однако вызвать взаимность у дам сердца не так просто, как кажется.

programme.title: Универ. Новая общага

programme.title: Мираж
programme.desc: После тяжелой автомобильной аварии Марина потеряла память. Домашняя обстановка, муж, подруга – все кажется ей чужим и непривычным. В своих снах она видит совершенно другую жизнь и каждый раз маленького мальчика, хотя муж уверяет, что у них не было детей. Супруг обращается в психиатрическую клинику. Но Марину гложут сомнения, и она нанимает частного детектива…

В центре истории – непростые отношения хирурга Олега Брагина, блестящего врача, умного, жесткого и харизматичного, но давно отчаявшегося найти в жизни что-то настоящее, кроме работы, и начальницы Ларисы – сумевшей сквозь цинизм Брагина разглядеть потерянного в жизни и одинокого человека...

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. К помощи экспертов обращаются различные государственные структуры, будь то полиция или следственный комитет. Служба имеет целый штат профессионалов своего дела – тут и криминалисты, и баллистики, и патологоанатомы, и программисты. Кроме того, каждый кабинет оборудован по последнему слову техники. Парк автомобилей представлен лучшими моделями отечественного и иностранного производства. На этот раз ребятам предстоит столкнуться с серийным убийцей. Он хитер, расчетлив, и каждый раз ему удается бежать от наказания. Однако за дело берутся лучшие специалисты в своем деле, и на этот раз ему не скрыться. Улики собраны, осталось только навестить преступника. проверенным товарищам, и скоро ему понадобится их помощь и поддержка…

programme.title: След
programme.desc: Федеральная экспертная служба занимается расследованием самых запутанных дел. programme.title: Love and Translation
programme.desc: The series brings three American men and 12 international women together on a remote paradise island for a chance at finding romance. And heres the twist: none of the women speak English and none of the men speak other languages. Without being able to speak to one another and without the use of translators, the singles need to count on their senses to help develop their connection and determine the power of their chemistry and attraction.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Definitely not created for the squeamish, Dr Pimple Popper features dermatologist and Internet celebrity Dr. Sandra Lee as she treats patients suffering with unique skin conditions such as facial and skin disorders. Including the extraction of blackheads, cysts and uncovering new skin conditions that audiences may not have known of before, Dr. Sandra Lee started uploading content onto Youtube and Instagram, gaining a lot of popularity by people enjoying spots and cysts being popped. Those included within her videos gave written permission for her to record and post the content in exchange for discounted or free-treatments. Dr. Pimple Popper is on a mission to reclaim the lives of those suffering with these unusual and rare skin condition and remove their embarrassment.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: Criss-crossing the globe, Body Bizarre embarks on a voyage of discovery unlike any other. From Indias child snake charmers to the worlds hairiest girl, this series uncovers the real human stories behind the headlines. With deeply personal interviews and footage from the most unusual of day-to-day routines, its an adventure through the truly astonishing. Six-year-old Liu Jiangli was abandoned by her parents as a two-year-old after being born with large black spots and fur on her face and body. Connie Culp became the first American to undergo a face transplant in 2008, after being shot in the face by her ex-husband. These stories, and others, explore what life is like for some of the worlds most extraordinary individuals.

programme.title: Virgins
programme.desc: Sonalis frustration with her intimacy partner comes to a head when the topic turns to self-touch, and Deanne bares it all on stage.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance UK
programme.desc: Shane is anxiously awaiting news on whether Mert can enter the UK. David has developed feelings for Tionne, but can he afford her expensive tastes?

programme.title: Love and Translation
programme.desc: The series brings three American men and 12 international women together on a remote paradise island for a chance at finding romance. And heres the twist: none of the women speak English and none of the men speak other languages. Without being able to speak to one another and without the use of translators, the singles need to count on their senses to help develop their connection and determine the power of their chemistry and attraction.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: Amber and Trent Johnston are living the American dream. They have been happily married for 14 years and have five children ranging from 6 to 13 years old. On paper, they might seem like your average family...yet in person, they attract a lot of attention.... because all seven members of the Johnston family – Amber, Trent, their two biological children, Jonah and Elizabeth, as well as their three adopted children, Anna, Emma and Alex – happen to have Achondroplasia Dwarfism. Together, these spunky seven make up the largest known family of Achondroplastic dwarfs in the world, and even describe themselves as "the real life seven dwarfs."

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric Waldrop, their three older boys and sextuplet babies are a tight-knit family living on a sheep farm in small town Alabama. Their strong desire for one more baby resulted in the biggest possible surprise- sextuplets. Have a close look at this adorable family and all of its members starting from the days when there were "just" five of them. Risky pregnancy, premature birth, arriving home, taking care of six babies, managing the whole family and adjusting to the new pace of life- all of this and much more are there for the viewers.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Delves into the heart of world famous Kleinfeld Bridal where the staff face immense pressure to help each bride find the dress if her dreams. Take a peak at the brides as they try on their dream dresses! It brings us up close and into the dressing room as brides prepare for their big day. Moms, bridesmaids and friends all express their opinions and often frustrate both bride and staff. In the end though, most brides find that "dream dress" and walk down with their grooms into wedded bliss.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: Hosted by Buddy Valastro, this cooking program takes various Italian-American dishes from Valastros own family recipes and shows how they can be prepared in minimal time and using ingredients that are easily obtainable and affordable. Each meal usually consists of a main course, a side dish and a dessert and Buddy is joined in the kitchen by members of his family to show us how its done and to add authenticity. Episodes feature Buddy and his wife Lisa making chicken Sorrentino with fusilli with a side of asparagus and chocolate dipped strawberries for dessert for date night; Auntie Anna revealing her secret recipes for manicotti and her chicken with vinegar peppers; or Buddy and his cousin Frankie reminiscing about the sights and food of Italian street fairs. The recipe for each dish can be found on the shows website.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Before the 90 Days
programme.desc: Can you find you husband or wife in the short space of 90 days? What will it actually take for you to marry your person, EVEN before you ever met them? Watch various couple as they head off on the adventures of a lifetime trying to find their significant other as well as attempting to try and establish a personal relationship something they have been talking to online. Follow them on their journey travelling to meet the person they have been talking to. Will this turn out to actually be beneficial or a big waste of time? What will happen next?

programme.title: Love and Translation
programme.desc: The series brings three American men and 12 international women together on a remote paradise island for a chance at finding romance. And heres the twist: none of the women speak English and none of the men speak other languages. Without being able to speak to one another and without the use of translators, the singles need to count on their senses to help develop their connection and determine the power of their chemistry and attraction.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlos Bakery in Hoboken New Jersey create elaborate, elegant and interesting edible art cakes. Cake Boss follows the team, led by Buddy Valastro, as they design and create two of these masterpieces for all kinds of events and occassions. The show explores the intricacy of working with your family, and their interpersonal relationships with other employees. Watch as they create everything from classic wedding cakes to alien spaceships.

Together, these spunky seven make up the largest known family of Achondroplastic dwarfs in the world, and even describe themselves as "the real life seven dwarfs."

programme.title: Outdaughtered
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle Busby are unique; they are the only parents, on record in the United States, to have all-girl quintuplets. In this series, we follow the loving husband and wife as they embark on a challenge like no other: parenthood. Adam, or Buzz as he is sometimes called, is one lonely guy, outnumbered by his kin of women. With girls Olivia, Ava, Riley, Parker, Hazel, eldest child Blayke and of course, wife Danielle, Adam must learn to embrace his feminine side. Whether its juggling work and home life, battling illnesses and ailments or deciding where to send the girls to school, the family are faced with tough decisions every day, and soon learn that their life as they knew it has changed forever.

Moms, bridesmaids and friends all express their opinions and often frustrate both bride and staff. programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters
programme.desc: With an average weight of over 1000lbs, nothing can support the Slaton sisters like they can support each other. With hopes of a healthier life, the sisters embark on a journey to drop enough weight that they qualify for a life changing bariatric surgery. Without the surgery, Amy will never be able to become a mother like she dreams of, and Tammy will be bedridden. After meeting with medical experts, the sisters strive to reach their goal but drama ensues as they struggle to stick to their healthy diets. Will the Slaton sisters stay on the right track and turn their lifestyles around?

programme.title: Cake Boss

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Kody Brown, with his four wives Meri, Janelle, Robyn and Christine and their combined 17 children, attempt to navigate life as a "normal" family in a society that shuns their lifestyle. From their unconventional family structure and living arrangements to financial challenges, each half hour episode exposes the inner workings of a polygamist household, revealing the unexpectedly tight-knit and loving relationships between Kodys wives. The series also captures the intense dynamics surrounding a man juggling three wives while attempting to keep it a secret from the outside world- but the general public is not the only challenge that the Brown family unit is facing.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance
programme.desc: Buckle up, TLC and 90 Day Fiance fans! Hot off their upcoming appearance on 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER?, fan-favorites Pedro and Chantel and their lively in-laws will be the focal point of a spinoff series from the 90 DAY FIANCÉ franchise called THE FAMILY CHANTEL, premiering Monday nights this July. Ever since Chantel first introduced Pedro to her family under the false pretense of him coming to America on a student visa, the drama that followed has kept fans obsessed. From their beginnings on 90 DAY FIANCÉ season four through 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER, Pedro and Chantel have weathered major marital ups and downs involving everything from feisty family members to their own trust issues. Viewers will follow this unique modern family as they try to move past their differences and come together as an extended family, but as Chantels parents Karen and Thomas try to protect their brood, will they push their children too far? The family members featured in the upcoming series include Chantels parents Karen and Thomas and siblings River and Winter, as well as Pedros mother Lidia and sister Nicole.

programme.title: Coming From America
programme.desc: Four African American families pack up all their belongings, risking everything to move to the new land of opportunity: Africa. First, theyll have to survive the inevitable culture shock – but if they can endure the first 60 days, their lives could be changed forever.

programme.title: Sister Wives
programme.desc: Kody Brown, with his four wives Meri, Janelle, Robyn and Christine and their combined 17 children, attempt to navigate life as a "normal" family in a society that shuns their lifestyle. From their unconventional family structure and living arrangements to financial challenges, each half hour episode exposes the inner workings of a polygamist household, revealing the unexpectedly tight-knit and loving relationships between Kodys wives. The series also captures the intense dynamics surrounding a man juggling three wives while attempting to keep it a secret from the outside world- but the general public is not the only challenge that the Brown family unit is facing.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons
programme.desc: Amber and Trent Johnston are living the American dream. They have been happily married for 14 years and have five children ranging from 6 to 13 years old. On paper, they might seem like your average family...yet in person, they attract a lot of attention.... because all seven members of the Johnston family – Amber, Trent, their two biological children, Jonah and Elizabeth, as well as their three adopted children, Anna, Emma and Alex – happen to have Achondroplasia Dwarfism. Together, these spunky seven make up the largest known family of Achondroplastic dwarfs in the world, and even describe themselves as "the real life seven dwarfs."

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric Waldrop, their three older boys and sextuplet babies are a tight-knit family living on a sheep farm in small town Alabama. Their strong desire for one more baby resulted in the biggest possible surprise- sextuplets. Have a close look at this adorable family and all of its members starting from the days when there were "just" five of them. Risky pregnancy, premature birth, arriving home, taking care of six babies, managing the whole family and adjusting to the new pace of life- all of this and much more are there for the viewers.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance
programme.desc: Buckle up, TLC and 90 Day Fiance fans! Hot off their upcoming appearance on 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER?, fan-favorites Pedro and Chantel and their lively in-laws will be the focal point of a spinoff series from the 90 DAY FIANCÉ franchise called THE FAMILY CHANTEL, premiering Monday nights this July. Ever since Chantel first introduced Pedro to her family under the false pretense of him coming to America on a student visa, the drama that followed has kept fans obsessed. From their beginnings on 90 DAY FIANCÉ season four through 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER, Pedro and Chantel have weathered major marital ups and downs involving everything from feisty family members to their own trust issues. Viewers will follow this unique modern family as they try to move past their differences and come together as an extended family, but as Chantels parents Karen and Thomas try to protect their brood, will they push their children too far? The family members featured in the upcoming series include Chantels parents Karen and Thomas and siblings River and Winter, as well as Pedros mother Lidia and sister Nicole.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Delves into the heart of world famous Kleinfeld Bridal where the staff face immense pressure to help each bride find the dress if her dreams. Take a peak at the brides as they try on their dream dresses! It brings us up close and into the dressing room as brides prepare for their big day. Moms, bridesmaids and friends all express their opinions and often frustrate both bride and staff. In the end though, most brides find that "dream dress" and walk down with their grooms into wedded bliss.

programme.title: Kitchen Boss
programme.desc: Hosted by Buddy Valastro, this cooking program takes various Italian-American dishes from Valastros own family recipes and shows how they can be prepared in minimal time and using ingredients that are easily obtainable and affordable. Each meal usually consists of a main course, a side dish and a dessert and Buddy is joined in the kitchen by members of his family to show us how its done and to add authenticity. Episodes feature Buddy and his wife Lisa making chicken Sorrentino with fusilli with a side of asparagus and chocolate dipped strawberries for dessert for date night; Auntie Anna revealing her secret recipes for manicotti and her chicken with vinegar peppers; or Buddy and his cousin Frankie reminiscing about the sights and food of Italian street fairs. The recipe for each dish can be found on the shows website.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlos Bakery in Hoboken New Jersey create elaborate, elegant and interesting edible art cakes. Cake Boss follows the team, led by Buddy Valastro, as they design and create two of these masterpieces for all kinds of events and occassions. The show explores the intricacy of working with your family, and their interpersonal relationships with other employees. Watch as they create everything from classic wedding cakes to alien spaceships.

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.desc: Carlos Bakery in Hoboken New Jersey create elaborate, elegant and interesting edible art cakes. The show explores the intricacy of working with your family, and their interpersonal relationships with other employees. Watch as they create everything from classic wedding cakes to alien spaceships.

programme.title: Coming From America
programme.desc: Four African American families pack up all their belongings, risking everything to move to the new land of opportunity: Africa. Enticed by cheap housing and picturesque landscapes, these families travel 5000 miles to find love, jobs and a better life. First, theyll have to survive the inevitable culture shock – but if they can endure the first 60 days, their lives could be changed forever.

programme.title: Unexpected: Teenage and Pregnant
programme.desc: This programme aims to explore the complicated issues that can happen when teenage pregnancy suddenly happens. Focusing on three girls, the camera captures each trimester and the first few weeks of parenthood. Each couple is completely unprepared for what is about to happen when they become parents which is where each set of grandparents comes in handy. Tensions become high as everyone has their own set of rules on what the "perfect" parent should be like and what the future beholds for the young parents to be.

programme.title: The Family Chantel
programme.desc: Buckle up, TLC and 90 Day Fiance fans! Hot off their upcoming appearance on 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER?, fan-favorites Pedro and Chantel and their lively in-laws will be the focal point of a spinoff series from the 90 DAY FIANCÉ franchise called THE FAMILY CHANTEL, premiering Monday nights this July. Ever since Chantel first introduced Pedro to her family under the false pretense of him coming to America on a student visa, the drama that followed has kept fans obsessed. From their beginnings on 90 DAY FIANCÉ season four through 90 DAY FIANCÉ: HAPPILY EVER AFTER, Pedro and Chantel have weathered major marital ups and downs involving everything from feisty family members to their own trust issues. Viewers will follow this unique modern family as they try to move past their differences and come together as an extended family, but as Chantels parents Karen and Thomas try to protect their brood, will they push their children too far? The family members featured in the upcoming series include Chantels parents Karen and Thomas and siblings River and Winter, as well as Pedros mother Lidia and sister Nicole.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Definitely not created for the squeamish, Dr Pimple Popper features dermatologist and Internet celebrity Dr. Sandra Lee as she treats patients suffering with unique skin conditions such as facial and skin disorders. Including the extraction of blackheads, cysts and uncovering new skin conditions that audiences may not have known of before, Dr. Sandra Lee started uploading content onto Youtube and Instagram, gaining a lot of popularity by people enjoying spots and cysts being popped. Those included within her videos gave written permission for her to record and post the content in exchange for discounted or free-treatments. Dr. Pimple Popper is on a mission to reclaim the lives of those suffering with these unusual and rare skin condition and remove their embarrassment.

programme.title: Body Bizarre
programme.desc: Criss-crossing the globe, Body Bizarre embarks on a voyage of discovery unlike any other. From Indias child snake charmers to the worlds hairiest girl, this series uncovers the real human stories behind the headlines. With deeply personal interviews and footage from the most unusual of day-to-day routines, its an adventure through the truly astonishing. Six-year-old Liu Jiangli was abandoned by her parents as a two-year-old after being born with large black spots and fur on her face and body. Connie Culp became the first American to undergo a face transplant in 2008, after being shot in the face by her ex-husband. These stories, and others, explore what life is like for some of the worlds most extraordinary individuals.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Thrilling American paranormal docu-reality series that follows investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry who visit various haunted homes across the country in order to help people who are tormented by the spirits of their late relatives. These families are scared by the mysterious occurences and they will seek help from this amazing ghost-hunting duo. Amy and Adam will try to find evidence of paranormal presence, contact the spirits and provide closure for the featured family.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: On "The Dead Files," Cindy Kaza, an evidential medium, and Steve DiSchiavi, a retired NYPD homicide detective, join forces to investigate paranormal activity in haunted locations across the United States. Their unique talents combine to create a powerful team that aims to unravel the mysteries of the supernatural world. With a blend of psychic intuition and investigative skills, Kaza and DiSchiavi explored the boundaries between the living and the dead, seeking answers to unexplained phenomena that defy conventional explanations. Their captivating narratives offer viewers a glimpse into the uncharted territories of the afterlife, bridging the gap between this world and the next.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places
programme.desc: Join our crew as they take us on a journey to investigate some of the scariest and most spine-chilling places on the planet. We visit horrifying haunts and encounter mysterious creatures that are not of this world. Not for the faint-hearted, each hour-long episode of this series explores such ghoulish phenomena as the malevolent spirits that stalk an abandoned amusement park; the realm of the undead who inhabit a derelict theatre that is used as a morgue; the spirits of long-dead seamen who still walk the decks of a decommisioned warship; and an island that is still in thrall to the presence of an infamous pirate.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: This paranormal reality series follows explorer and ghost hunter Dakota Laden who partners up his sister Chelsea and best friend Tanner, to travel across the country in an RV and visit the most haunted locations in America -dark corridors of Brushy Mountain State Penitentiary, notorious Eloise Psychiatric Hospital, terrifying St. Albans Sanatorium and many more, as they learn the blood-chilling stories behind this scary places and face their darkest fears.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Hotel
programme.desc: Documentary series that investigates the secrets and legends hidden in the rooms of many hotels, motels and resorts in America. With two million hotel rooms occupied every night in America, its no wonder that some of the most captivating tales have occurred in hotels. Each episode includes dramatic recreations featuring actors re-telling the most mysterious, outrageous and strange stories and legends from Americas history that have occurred either inside the rooms, or near famous and even not-so-famous hotels.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Hotel
programme.desc: Documentary series that investigates the secrets and legends hidden in the rooms of many hotels, motels and resorts in America. With two million hotel rooms occupied every night in America, its no wonder that some of the most captivating tales have occurred in hotels. programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: On "The Dead Files," Cindy Kaza, an evidential medium, and Steve DiSchiavi, a retired NYPD homicide detective, join forces to investigate paranormal activity in haunted locations across the United States. Their captivating narratives offer viewers a glimpse into the uncharted territories of the afterlife, bridging the gap between this world and the next.

programme.title: Coopers Treasure
programme.desc: Considered one of NASAs original space pioneers, astronaut Gordon Cooper discovered something extraordinary on a 1963 mission. While circling Earth during a 122-hour flight to detect nuclear sites, Cooper photographed more than 100 anomalies around the South Caribbean. He later believed the dark patches that appeared on the photos to be sunken ships, and while working for decades in secret, Gordon created a map that he thought could uncover treasures worth billions of dollars. Before passing away, he shared his meticulous research with longtime friend Darrell Miklos, and now Miklos is teaming with seasoned explorers and researchers to finally make good on Gordons dream.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: While Josh, Chad and John are down at base camp prepping the dredge to move to the upper lake, Eric and the Red Zone team are pulling out rubies by the scores, but its a hard-won success. With food supplies almost nonexistent and weather turning from bad to worse on a dime, the team is mustering all its strength to make this venture a success. John desperately wants to see the rubies on his 50th birthday, so he makes a foolhardy hike to the Red Zone with more than 50 pounds of reindeer meat on his back. Its a dangerous trek never before done by any human, and with the wrong intentions, he puts the team at severe risk with his choice to redeem himself. Meanwhile, Eric gets a bad case of ruby fever and successfully ventures farther and deeper into the Red Zone. The miners find a deposit a hundred times better than their first and confirm they could be sitting at the epicenter of the largest ruby band in the world. They find one particular ruby worth $200,000, but with ruby fever in full swing, the team members begin to mistrust themselves and each other. Eric tries to take control but ends up breaking the ruby that could have paid for the whole season. The groups low morale is saved when John arrives with reindeer meat, but time and weather are forcing them to leave the Red Zone in two days. In the mad rush to take care of business, the team begins to unravel again, and adding John into the mix only stirs the pot worse.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: ICE COLD GOLD spotlights a spirited team of miners who are among the first Americans to prospect for precious metals and gems in parts of Greenland where humans never have set foot before. The six-part series follows eight men who leave behind their families, friends and homeland to strike it rich against all odds while struggling to survive against the harshest of conditions. Greenlands a veritable beast, but the motley crew of ICE COLD GOLD miners is up for the challenge. Each thinks he has what it takes to walk away with gold, rubies and sapphires before winter and large mining companies swoop in. What transpires as the miners cope with the unpredictable, harsh unknown? Are they humbled by their journey? Do their personalities get in the way? Most importantly, do they strike ICE COLD GOLD?ed ice sheets.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: Documentary series. Using eye-witness accounts and new, incredible scientific evidence, In Search Of Monsters brings to life the haunting creatures that both fright and fascinate us. Narrated by Gabe Kunda, the series covers some of the most iconic and infamous monsters in folklore. From Bigfoots DNA to Nessies true whereabouts, In Search Of Monsters investigates astonishing new theories on these grisly giants.

programme.title: In Search Of Monsters
programme.desc: Documentary series. Using eye-witness accounts and new, incredible scientific evidence, In Search Of Monsters brings to life the haunting creatures that both fright and fascinate us. Narrated by Gabe Kunda, the series covers some of the most iconic and infamous monsters in folklore. From Bigfoots DNA to Nessies true whereabouts, In Search Of Monsters investigates astonishing new theories on these grisly giants.

programme.title: NASAs Unexplained Files
programme.desc: What do we really know about life beyond the realm of our planet? Disturbing discoveries about the rest of our universe have perplexed scientists, and the rest of the world, for as long as we can remember. Now, the files and discoveries of one of the worlds biggest independent agencies have been dug up, for thorough investigation. Each episode scrutinises questionable evidence, encounters and sightings, to shed some light on the unexplained files of NASA. Featuring testimonies of NASA insiders and scientists who have first hand experience of the enigmas, laying within our universe.

programme.title: NASAs Unexplained Files

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: SaraJane and her four daughters from Southern California pool their savings and head to Alaska in an attempt to reopen their deceased Grandfathers gold mines, one in Nome and another 500 miles away in Fairbanks. Working side by side with grizzled Alaskan mining crews, SJ and her daughters face everything Alaska has to offer, and then some. In a race against the season-ending winter, the women push to secure a return on their investment, as well as a renewal of their family legacy.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: SaraJane and her four daughters from Southern California pool their savings and head to Alaska in an attempt to reopen their deceased Grandfathers gold mines, one in Nome and another 500 miles away in Fairbanks. Working side by side with grizzled Alaskan mining crews, SJ and her daughters face everything Alaska has to offer, and then some. In a race against the season-ending winter, the women push to secure a return on their investment, as well as a renewal of their family legacy.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: Within the Last Frontier lies a region known as the Alaska Triangle, spanning 200,000 unforgiving square miles where more people go missing per capita than anywhere else on earth. Treacherous terrain and unforgiving natural elements have stopped many in their tracks, but some Alaskans hold onto the idea that mysterious monsters snatched them up. Unidentified crypto-creatures wander the state covered by millions of acres of dense wilderness and are known to lift and reposition trees with ease, create seismic activity with their minds, and even decapitate humans with one bite. Destination Americas new series ALASKA MONSTERS travels with a team of native outdoorsmen, who call themselves the Midnight Sons, as they investigate the harsh Alaskan forest in a quest to uncover proof of frightening monsters thought to be living there.

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: Within the Last Frontier lies a region known as the Alaska Triangle, spanning 200,000 unforgiving square miles where more people go missing per capita than anywhere else on earth. programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: Find out the breathtaking stories hidden behind the doors of the most famous, notorious and impressive castles and mansions in different parts of the world. Listen to their dark secrets and mysterious legends, and visit Frankenstein Castle in Darmstadt, Germany, the Tower of London in London, England, Castello di Malaspina in Fosdinovo, Italy, Edinburgh Castle in Edinburgh, Scotland, Bran Castle in Bran, Romania and other magic spots.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: Find out the breathtaking stories hidden behind the doors of the most famous, notorious and impressive castles and mansions in different parts of the world. Listen to their dark secrets and mysterious legends, and visit Frankenstein Castle in Darmstadt, Germany, the Tower of London in London, England, Castello di Malaspina in Fosdinovo, Italy, Edinburgh Castle in Edinburgh, Scotland, Bran Castle in Bran, Romania and other magic spots.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: Paranormal Lockdown brings together Nick Groff from Ghost Adventures and Katrina Weidmann from Paranormal State as they spend 72 hours completely locked down in some of the most haunted places in America. Believing that by spending time isolated within a haunted location for a longer period of time than most paranormal shows will bring them closer to communication with the spirits that may be haunting these locations.

programme.title: The Holzer Files
programme.desc: Based on the real life files of Americas first ghost hunter, Dr. Hans Holzer (whose most famous case concerned the Lutz family of Amityville, NY), this show follows a team of paranormal investigators as they reexamine the terrifying tales that mystified the doctor. The team consists of paranormal investigator Dave Schrader, psychic medium Cindy Kaza and equipment technician Shane Pittman and they are aided by Holzers daughter, Alexandra. They examine thousands of documents, letters, photographs, and audio and visual recordings, sometimes going as far back as the 50s. Following on from where Holzer left off, the team bring the investigations up to the present day and visit the locations of the supernatural events such as the Peck House, the Morris-Jumel Mansion, the Whaley House, and the USS Constellation.

programme.title: The Holzer Files

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Terror at Maple Dale Farm. Donna Santos spent years rescuing animals, but that changed when her animals were terrorised by a malicious presence. Donna called in an animal intuitive and communicator to help.

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores extraordinary stories in this riveting documentary series, delving into myths, legends, and local tales to reveal the truth behind a number of perplexing tales. His adventures take him all across the American landscape as he attempts to get to the bottom of some of historys most intriguing stories, examining astonishing and implausible events. Each episode focusses on a variety of inextricable events, using interviews, archive footage, and dramatised re-enactments to portray the implausible. Let Don take you Beyond the Unknown; a world of bizarre occurrences, peculiarities, sinister evils, and unsolved happenings.

programme.title: Ghost Brothers
programme.desc: What you see is what you get with Dalen Spratt, Juwan Mass and Marcus Harvey, the Southeasts newest and most dynamic paranormal investigation team. These three best friends lead Destination Americas new series GHOST BROTHERS, on a mission to uncover whether some unique, legendary "haunted" houses are the real deal. Raised in religious households, Dalen, Juwan and Marcus were taught that "messing" with the dead is dangerous business, but some unexplained experiences of their own piqued their intense fascination, ultimately driving them to find out firsthand just how spooky the supernatural can be. Blending natural curiosity with comedic flair, these charismatic characters offer a fresh, funny and unique take on the spirit world.

Treacherous terrain and unforgiving natural elements have stopped many in their tracks, but some Alaskans hold onto the idea that mysterious monsters snatched them up. Unidentified crypto-creatures wander the state covered by millions of acres of dense wilderness and are known to lift and reposition trees with ease, create seismic activity with their minds, and even decapitate humans with one bite. Destination Americas new series ALASKA MONSTERS travels with a team of native outdoorsmen, who call themselves the Midnight Sons, as they investigate the harsh Alaskan forest in a quest to uncover proof of frightening monsters thought to be living there.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: Find out the breathtaking stories hidden behind the doors of the most famous, notorious and impressive castles and mansions in different parts of the world. Listen to their dark secrets and mysterious legends, and visit Frankenstein Castle in Darmstadt, Germany, the Tower of London in London, England, Castello di Malaspina in Fosdinovo, Italy, Edinburgh Castle in Edinburgh, Scotland, Bran Castle in Bran, Romania and other magic spots.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: Find out the breathtaking stories hidden behind the doors of the most famous, notorious and impressive castles and mansions in different parts of the world. programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Unmasking an aspect of dining out that will make you think twice before ordering off the menu, and utilizing his knowledge of all things edible, Andrew Zimmern is on a quest to find the worlds most bizarre foods. Andrew knows that one mans poison is anothers delicacy but he isnt afraid to poke a little fun at the local fare or himself. Our energetic food-a-holic infiltrates markets and restaurants taking viewers behind the scenes to savor the local cuisine - even if that means chewing on eggs with legs, gulping down a beating frog heart or polishing off a lambs eyeball. Andrew is game for anything and knows the most interesting food is found closest to the source. So whether hes chasing down large water rodents in the Louisiana bayou, fishing for piranha in the Amazon or flushing out cave bats in Malaysia, you can be sure the guy with the iron stomach will dish up the unimaginable.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Thrilling American paranormal docu-reality series that follows investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry who visit various haunted homes across the country in order to help people who are tormented by the spirits of their late relatives. These families are scared by the mysterious occurences and they will seek help from this amazing ghost-hunting duo. Amy and Adam will try to find evidence of paranormal presence, contact the spirits and provide closure for the featured family.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies
programme.desc: Codes and Conspiracies series uncovers the mind-blowing truth and secret history hidden behind the worlds most iconic institutions, secret societies, notorious locations, and mysterious symbols. Find out a dark side of America, presented by shadowy organizations and underground places. There are plenty of spots still remaining secret and puzzles still not done all over the country. The series explores them and presents the uncovered and deciphered of a mysterious real world. Did President Roosevelt know about Pearl Harbor? What are the dirty secrets of slot machines in Las Vegas? What are the blackest secrets of Alcatraz?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies
programme.desc: Codes and Conspiracies series uncovers the mind-blowing truth and secret history hidden behind the worlds most iconic institutions, secret societies, notorious locations, and mysterious symbols. programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: Paranormal Lockdown brings together Nick Groff from Ghost Adventures and Katrina Weidmann from Paranormal State as they spend 72 hours completely locked down in some of the most haunted places in America. Believing that by spending time isolated within a haunted location for a longer period of time than most paranormal shows will bring them closer to communication with the spirits that may be haunting these locations.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Experts and eyewitnesses attempt to unlock the mystery of the Alaska Triangle, a remote area infamous for alien abductions, Bigfoot sightings, paranormal phenomena and vanishing airplanes. Throughout the series, we meet a woman whose idyllic Alaskan dream soon descends into a paranormal nightmare, as she starts to suffer attacks by an unseen force. Recent sightings may prove that a Native American legend about a mysterious race of giants is true. The series also explores The Missing Douglas and whether an interdimensional portal in the Alaska Triangle led to the disappearance of the airplane carrying 44 military personnel in 1950.

programme.title: Haunting In The Heartland
programme.desc: Something evil lurks in the shadows of the close-knit communities, idyllic Main Streets and rolling fields of Americas heartland. Paranormal investigator Steve Shippy witnessed this darkness firsthand as a child growing up in rural Michigan. Now, with the help of local eyewitnesses and historical records, hes made it his mission to solve these mysterious hauntings and bring resolution to the living and the dead.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Two men occupy an old building. When they hear sounds and see shadowy figures, they call a paranormal team who gather evidence suggesting it is haunted by tortured souls.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Paranormal documentary and reality TV series follows investigations of scary locations reported to be haunted by ghost hunters Zak Bagans, Nick Groff, and Aaron Goodwin. Many places with shady past like hotels, casinos, homes, abandoned buildings are full of aggressive paranormal activities and do not let people live peacefully. Each episode begins with the crew touring the investigation site with its owners and interviewing the witnesses. Then the ghost hunters crew set up static night-vision cameras to film whats happening. They use a lot of up-to-date equipment to get any sort of evidence and then based on what they manage to get, they start analyzing and investigating things in order to get to the core of each case.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Thrilling American paranormal docu-reality series that follows investigators Amy Bruni and Adam Berry who visit various haunted homes across the country in order to help people who are tormented by the spirits of their late relatives. These families are scared by the mysterious occurences and they will seek help from this amazing ghost-hunting duo. Amy and Adam will try to find evidence of paranormal presence, contact the spirits and provide closure for the featured family.

programme.title: Beyond The Unknown
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores extraordinary stories in this riveting documentary series, delving into myths, legends, and local tales to reveal the truth behind a number of perplexing tales. His adventures take him all across the American landscape as he attempts to get to the bottom of some of historys most intriguing stories, examining astonishing and implausible events. Each episode focusses on a variety of inextricable events, using interviews, archive footage, and dramatised re-enactments to portray the implausible. Let Don take you Beyond the Unknown; a world of bizarre occurrences, peculiarities, sinister evils, and unsolved happenings.

programme.title: Ghost Brothers
programme.desc: What you see is what you get with Dalen Spratt, Juwan Mass and Marcus Harvey, the Southeasts newest and most dynamic paranormal investigation team. These three best friends lead Destination Americas new series GHOST BROTHERS, on a mission to uncover whether some unique, legendary "haunted" houses are the real deal. Raised in religious households, Dalen, Juwan and Marcus were taught that "messing" with the dead is dangerous business, but some unexplained experiences of their own piqued their intense fascination, ultimately driving them to find out firsthand just how spooky the supernatural can be. Blending natural curiosity with comedic flair, these charismatic characters offer a fresh, funny and unique take on the spirit world.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Two men occupy an old building. When they hear sounds and see shadowy figures, they call a paranormal team who gather evidence suggesting it is haunted by tortured souls.

programme.title: Quest
programme.desc: Take a chance to explore magnificent cities all around the world with the help of XP Guide with TravelXP. The hosts will walk you through the streets of cities in the four corners of the Earth, will introduce you to local cuisine, show you the night life, demonstrate modern and ancient architecture, provide the best shopping places. Even if you do not plan to visit this very city it will be absolutely entertaining and eye-opening experience. And if you get inspired by some particular place, do not forget to turn off TV before you go on the road.

programme.title: Xplore Belgium
programme.desc: Xplore Belgium is an Indian travel television series hosted by actress Elisha Kriis, who tours Belgium visiting four cities: Brussels, Bruges, Antwerp and Ghent. Follow her in this exciting adventure and discover the rich history and culture of this country. Join her as she explores all the landmarks from both the past and the present, including the breathtaking cathedrals and palaces, and the mesmerizing canals and railway stations. She also gets to enjoys in the the most delicious chocolates and beer, and much more.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: For many years passion for travelling has been bringing people to unexplored continents, countries and places to look into culture, history, food, nature and people. This kind of passion if the key point of Backpack, a travel show that opens new spots all over the world by a show host travelling solo with a backpack. So make yourself comfortable and enjoy visiting Serbia, Spain, Israel, India, Egypt and many more. Take a look at the historical past and modern life, find out about traditions, get to know tourism hotspots and treasures of nature, plan your future vacations with the help of show hosts recommendations.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Jamie goes hiking in Norways popular mountain formation, Torghatten. From Horsemans arrow to Troll mountain, he comes across fasinating folklore, meets a local family and tries fishing in the sea.

programme.desc: Compelling documentary travel show that follows two popular actresses, influencers and VJs, Krissann Barretto and Benafsha Soonawalla, as they explore Madhya Pradesh, a state in central India.
